name: advanced-fluid-handling-continued
title: Advanced Fluid Handling Continued
author: TheStaplergun; continued for Factorio 2.1 by goakiller900
description: Advanced Fluid Handling Continued (AFHC) brings the original Advanced Fluid Handling gameplay to Factorio 2.1 and Space Age, including tiered underground pipes, independently rotatable multi-port pipes-to-ground, underground pumps, and adjustable valves.
